specs.title: cp-000: Academic editor non-H1 heading placeholder reads Section heading
cp-001: Academic editor root EditorContent class includes prose prose-lg
cp-002: Academic editor root enables browser spellcheck via spellchecktrue
cp-003: CmdCtrlS inside AcademicEditor calls the route flushSave path and prevents the b
cp-004: Initial editor-content hydration only runs when the current editor text is still
cp-005: Initial outline bootstrapping waits 300 ms after mount before scanning headings
cp-006: Initial outline bootstrapping clears the outline store when the document has few
cp-007: AcademicEditor recalculates and stores comment counts whenever documentId change
cp-008: AcademicEditor syncs the top-bar reference badge count from the referenceCount p
cp-009: scholarsynceditor-action with add-comment opens the comment sidebar first if it
cp-010: scholarsynceditor-action with add-comment always dispatches scholarsyncnew-inlin
cp-011: scholarsynceditor-action with toggle-comment-sidebar toggles the sidebar without
cp-012: scholarsynceditor-action with insert-citation forwards directly to onOpenCitatio
cp-013: scholarsynceditor-action with toggle-reference-sidebar forwards directly to onTo
cp-014: TopBar undo button title is exactly Undo
cp-015: TopBar redo button title is exactly Redo
cp-016: TopBar undo button is disabled when editorcanundo is false
cp-017: TopBar redo button is disabled when editorcanredo is false
cp-018: TopBar mode dropdown options are exactly Editing and Viewing
cp-019: TopBar mode option Editing description reads Direct changes to document
cp-020: TopBar mode option Viewing description reads Read-only no edits
cp-021: Switching TopBar mode to Viewing calls editorsetEditablefalse
cp-022: Switching TopBar mode back to Editing calls editorsetEditabletrue
cp-023: TopBar mode dropdown uses a fixed fullscreen click-catcher to dismiss
cp-024: TopBar word-count button title reads Click for section breakdown
cp-025: TopBar section-breakdown popover closes on outside mouse down
cp-026: TopBar saved state renders only saved saving unsaved and offline it has no dedic
cp-027: TopBar keyboard-help button title is Keyboard shortcuts Cmd
cp-028: SelectionToolbar renders only when the current selection is non-empty
cp-029: Clearing the text selection hides the floating toolbar entirely
cp-030: Clearing the text selection also closes the style dropdown and highlight palette
cp-031: SelectionToolbar positions itself using coordsAtPosselectionfrom
cp-032: SelectionToolbar delays blur-close by 150 ms to allow button interactions inside
cp-033: Style dropdown current label resolves in priority order Heading 4 Heading 3 Head
cp-034: Style dropdown button minimum width is 90 px
